introSection: Howler is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Holiday World & Splashin' Safari in Santa Claus, Indiana, USA. This ride, which opened on May 8, 1999, replaced the park's older Firecracker roller coaster and is inspired by Holidog, the mascot of Holiday World.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and supports, used to be yellow.

fullText:
Howler is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Holiday World & Splashin' Safari in Santa Claus, Indiana, USA. This ride, which opened on May 8, 1999, replaced the park's older Firecracker roller coaster and is inspired by Holidog, the mascot of Holiday World.



Blue track and supports, used to be yellow.
